---
title: "Palettes"
subtitle: "apples-oranges color schemes"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme:
      - default
      - schemes/select-default.scss
      - apples-oranges.scss
    slide-number: true
    transition: fade
    background-transition: fade
    footer: "Palette catalog"
---

## default {.palette-show .palette-default}

::: {.palette-desc}
Warm paper base with crimson / amber identities and a muted neutral bananas tone.
:::

::: {.palette-identities}
::: {.palette-chip .chip-apples}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
apples
:::
:::
::: {.palette-chip .chip-oranges}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
oranges
:::
:::
::: {.palette-chip .chip-bananas}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
bananas
:::
:::
:::

::: {.palette-pairing}
::: {.palette-pair-a}
apples on oranges
:::
::: {.palette-pair-o}
oranges on apples
:::
:::

::: {.palette-base}
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-fg}
foreground
:::
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-bg}
background
:::
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-muted}
muted
:::
:::

## nord {.palette-show .palette-nord}

::: {.palette-desc}
Snow-storm base with polar night / frost light / frost deep blues.
:::

::: {.palette-identities}
::: {.palette-chip .chip-apples}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
apples
:::
:::
::: {.palette-chip .chip-oranges}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
oranges
:::
:::
::: {.palette-chip .chip-bananas}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
bananas
:::
:::
:::

::: {.palette-pairing}
::: {.palette-pair-a}
apples on oranges
:::
::: {.palette-pair-o}
oranges on apples
:::
:::

::: {.palette-base}
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-fg}
foreground
:::
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-bg}
background
:::
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-muted}
muted
:::
:::

## solarized {.palette-show .palette-solarized}

::: {.palette-desc}
Solarized base03 dark / orange accent / cyan highlight.
:::

::: {.palette-identities}
::: {.palette-chip .chip-apples}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
apples
:::
:::
::: {.palette-chip .chip-oranges}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
oranges
:::
:::
::: {.palette-chip .chip-bananas}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
bananas
:::
:::
:::

::: {.palette-pairing}
::: {.palette-pair-a}
apples on oranges
:::
::: {.palette-pair-o}
oranges on apples
:::
:::

::: {.palette-base}
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-fg}
foreground
:::
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-bg}
background
:::
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-muted}
muted
:::
:::

## dracula {.palette-show .palette-dracula}

::: {.palette-desc}
Dracula current line / foreground / comment — core dark and light, no neon accents.
:::

::: {.palette-identities}
::: {.palette-chip .chip-apples}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
apples
:::
:::
::: {.palette-chip .chip-oranges}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
oranges
:::
:::
::: {.palette-chip .chip-bananas}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
bananas
:::
:::
:::

::: {.palette-pairing}
::: {.palette-pair-a}
apples on oranges
:::
::: {.palette-pair-o}
oranges on apples
:::
:::

::: {.palette-base}
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-fg}
foreground
:::
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-bg}
background
:::
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-muted}
muted
:::
:::

## gruvbox {.palette-show .palette-gruvbox}

::: {.palette-desc}
Gruvbox bg0 dark / orange identities and muted neutral.
:::

::: {.palette-identities}
::: {.palette-chip .chip-apples}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
apples
:::
:::
::: {.palette-chip .chip-oranges}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
oranges
:::
:::
::: {.palette-chip .chip-bananas}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
bananas
:::
:::
:::

::: {.palette-pairing}
::: {.palette-pair-a}
apples on oranges
:::
::: {.palette-pair-o}
oranges on apples
:::
:::

::: {.palette-base}
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-fg}
foreground
:::
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-bg}
background
:::
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-muted}
muted
:::
:::

## catppuccin {.palette-show .palette-catppuccin}

::: {.palette-desc}
Catppuccin Mocha with blue / mauve / green accents.
:::

::: {.palette-identities}
::: {.palette-chip .chip-apples}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
apples
:::
:::
::: {.palette-chip .chip-oranges}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
oranges
:::
:::
::: {.palette-chip .chip-bananas}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
bananas
:::
:::
:::

::: {.palette-pairing}
::: {.palette-pair-a}
apples on oranges
:::
::: {.palette-pair-o}
oranges on apples
:::
:::

::: {.palette-base}
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-fg}
foreground
:::
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-bg}
background
:::
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-muted}
muted
:::
:::

## rose-pine {.palette-show .palette-rose-pine}

::: {.palette-desc}
Rosé Pine with foam / rose / pine accents.
:::

::: {.palette-identities}
::: {.palette-chip .chip-apples}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
apples
:::
:::
::: {.palette-chip .chip-oranges}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
oranges
:::
:::
::: {.palette-chip .chip-bananas}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
bananas
:::
:::
:::

::: {.palette-pairing}
::: {.palette-pair-a}
apples on oranges
:::
::: {.palette-pair-o}
oranges on apples
:::
:::

::: {.palette-base}
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-fg}
foreground
:::
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-bg}
background
:::
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-muted}
muted
:::
:::

## grey {.palette-show .palette-grey}

::: {.palette-desc}
Near-black apples, near-white oranges, mid-grey bananas on a neutral base.
:::

::: {.palette-identities}
::: {.palette-chip .chip-apples}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
apples
:::
:::
::: {.palette-chip .chip-oranges}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
oranges
:::
:::
::: {.palette-chip .chip-bananas}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
bananas
:::
:::
:::

::: {.palette-pairing}
::: {.palette-pair-a}
apples on oranges
:::
::: {.palette-pair-o}
oranges on apples
:::
:::

::: {.palette-base}
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-fg}
foreground
:::
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-bg}
background
:::
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-muted}
muted
:::
:::

## google {.palette-show .palette-google}

::: {.palette-desc}
Google News blue (#174EA6) and red (#A50E0E) on light tinted surfaces; title uses medium blue (#4285F4).
:::

::: {.palette-identities}
::: {.palette-chip .chip-apples}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
apples
:::
:::
::: {.palette-chip .chip-oranges}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
oranges
:::
:::
::: {.palette-chip .chip-bananas}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
bananas
:::
:::
:::

::: {.palette-pairing}
::: {.palette-pair-a}
apples on oranges
:::
::: {.palette-pair-o}
oranges on apples
:::
:::

::: {.palette-base}
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-fg}
foreground
:::
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-bg}
background
:::
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-muted}
muted
:::
:::

## deepmind {.palette-show .palette-deepmind}

::: {.palette-desc}
Google DeepMind brand kit — deep navy, light blue, and primary blue.
:::

::: {.palette-identities}
::: {.palette-chip .chip-apples}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
apples
:::
:::
::: {.palette-chip .chip-oranges}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
oranges
:::
:::
::: {.palette-chip .chip-bananas}
::: {.palette-chip-label}
bananas
:::
:::
:::

::: {.palette-pairing}
::: {.palette-pair-a}
apples on oranges
:::
::: {.palette-pair-o}
oranges on apples
:::
:::

::: {.palette-base}
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-fg}
foreground
:::
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-bg}
background
:::
::: {.palette-base-chip .base-muted}
muted
:::
:::
